jobs.job_title: Composite Materials Manufacturing Engineer III – Aerospace
jobs.description: An aerospace company in Wilmington, MA is seeking a Composite Materials Engineer to support the production of advanced aerospace structures. You'll develop manufacturing processes for composite materials, conduct material testing, and collaborate closely with engineering teams. The ideal candidate has extensive experience in composites, is detail-oriented, and thrives in a dynamic, fast-paced environment. This role offers competitive pay and a comprehensive benefits package.

jobs.job_title: Entry-Level Composites Manufacturing Engineer — Stock Options
jobs.description: A leading technology firm in El Segundo, California, is seeking an enthusiastic entry-level manufacturing engineer. This role involves building and testing composite parts for aerospace applications. Candidates should have a degree in a relevant field and some experience in composite manufacturing. The position offers a salary between $80,000 and $120,000, along with benefits like healthcare coverage and paid time off. Join us to help shape the future of advanced manufacturing! SupportFinity™
